case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. JARVIE OLMOS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR OF $6,130.52 PLUS COSTS AGAINST DEFENDANT JARVIE OLMOS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. After the hearing the Court reviewed the record and Ordered the OSC off calendar/Judgment on file. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Continued To Apr-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Alisa J. Kim, Esq. (510.736.6293) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties is GRANTED. Plaintiff is entitled to judgment in its favor of $6,130.52 plus costs against defendant Jarvie Olmos. No opposition filed. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
